title: ziziphora clinopodioides
intro: Ziziphora clinopodioides, also known as Persian balm or ziziphora, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to the Middle East and Central Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and providing relief from respiratory problems like colds and coughs. Ziziphora clinopodioides is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its benefits.
